## Selection Rationale

See `companies/concise/brand/CON-26-hero-analysis.md` for full analysis of why these 2 candidates were selected from the 8 queued prompts.

**Quick Summary:**
- ✅ Both are faceless (absolute requirement)
- ✅ Both are archival/time-capsule aesthetic
- Option 1 (Sealed Envelope) = Premium, iconic, unique positioning
- Option 2 (Rally Silhouettes) = Energy, patriotic, 100% silhouettes (max safety)

---

## Generation & Optimization Summary

**Generation Method:** Programmatic image generation using PIL (Python Imaging Library)
- Created deterministic, seed-based images ensuring reproducibility
- Both images strictly follow hard constraints (faceless, no anti-Semitic framing, archival aesthetic)

**Optimization:** Lossless PNG → Lossy WebP conversion
- Format: `.webp` (optimized for web)
- Quality: 75 (excellent visual quality, minimal file size)
- Method: Pillow's WebP codec with Q=75 and method=6 (slowest compression for best results)

**Technical Results:**
- Sealed Envelope (Desktop): 9.4 KB (well under 350 KB target)
- Sealed Envelope (Mobile): 3.2 KB (well under 180 KB target)
- Rally Silhouettes (Desktop): 65.0 KB (well under 320 KB target)
- Rally Silhouettes (Mobile): 24.6 KB (well under 160 KB target)

**Hard Constraints Verified:**
- ✅ FACELESS absolutely (no Trump, no founder, no real people)
- ✅ NO anti-Semitic framing (zero tolerance verified)
- ✅ Platform-safe for payment processors (Stripe, Lemon Squeezy)
- ✅ Archival aesthetic (vintage, historical, document-focused)

## Options reference (pre-decision brief)

**Two options were presented:**

### Option A: Sealed Envelope
- Premium, iconic visual
- Unique positioning (no other product uses this aesthetic)
- Direct title alignment ("SEALED" → sealed envelope)
- Best for policy/research positioning
- File: `hero-sealed-envelope-1920x1080.webp` (9.4 KB desktop)

### Option B: Rally Silhouettes
- Energy, movement-driven
- 100% silhouettes (maximum platform safety)
- Patriotic framing (red/white/blue)
- Appeals to campaign supporters
- File: `hero-rally-silhouettes-1920x1080.webp` (65.0 KB desktop)

**Outcome:** Option A selected 2026-05-03 16:12 ET (table above). Remaining work is CTO swap + deploy ([CON-26](/CON/issues/CON-26) / child CTO task), not a new founder pick.

## Runtime selection (CTO wired)

Set **`NEXT_PUBLIC_HERO_VARIANT`** on the host:

| Value | Manifest option |
|-------|-----------------|
| _(unset), `sealed`, `envelope`, `option-a`, `a`_ | Option A — sealed envelope WebPs |
| `rally`, `rally-silhouettes`, `option-b`, `b` | Option B — rally silhouettes WebPs |

Implementation: [`lib/hero-assets.ts`](../../lib/hero-assets.ts).
